findings.name: overfitting
findings.headline: Volatility grew 3.3× by the final checkpoint — possible overfitting
findings.observation: Mean Volatility climbed from 4.694e-05 (median of epochs ['ep1', 'ep3', 'ep6']) to 0.0001541 at 'ep8'.
findings.why_it_matters: A late-training jump in Volatility means feature effects are now strongly sample-dependent — the model is memorising individual examples rather than generalising.
findings.recommendation: Consider early stopping at an earlier checkpoint, adding regularisation, or evaluating held-out generalisation.

findings.name: capacity
findings.headline: Healthy archetype distribution
findings.why_it_matters: No archetype dominates — the model has a diverse mix of feature roles.

findings.name: shortcut_learning
findings.headline: No background-shortcut signal — Foreground/Background interaction ratio = 0.50
findings.observation: Mean interaction in centre 50% of the image: 711.6780 ; in the surrounding ring: 706.9201 ; FBR=0.502.
findings.why_it_matters: A model that relies on background pixels (FBR < 0.5) is using context cues that won't generalise — the Waterbirds failure mode. The model should put more interaction on the central subject.
